title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/image/v5 to v5.30.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/image/v5](https://togithub.com/containers/image) | `v5.29.3-0.20240301163503-faa4f4fd0e4f` -> `v5.30.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fimage%2fv5/v5.30.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fimage%2fv5/v5.30.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fimage%2fv5/v5.29.3-0.20240301163503-faa4f4fd0e4f/v5.30.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fimage%2fv5/v5.29.3-0.20240301163503-faa4f4fd0e4f/v5.30.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/image (github.com/containers/image/v5)</summary>

### [`v5.30.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/releases/tag/v5.30.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/image/compare/v5.29.2...v5.30.0)

#### What's Changed

A fair number of improvements when working with `zstd` and `zstd:chunked`-compressed images.

Note that `make install` now installs `policy.json` and `registries.d/default.yaml`.

-   Refuse compression to zstd when using schema1 by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2196](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2196)
-   Don't expose local account details in oci-archive tar files by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2202](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2202)
-   Trigger a conversion to OCI when compressing to Zstd by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2204](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2204)
-   Add buildtags to avoid fulcio and rekor dependencies by [@​siretart](https://togithub.com/siretart) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2180](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2180)
-   copy: do not fail if digest mismatches by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1980](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/1980)
-   Moving policy.json and default.yaml from containers/skopeo by [@​rahilarious](https://togithub.com/rahilarious) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2215](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2215)
-   Embrace codespell: config, workflow (to alert when new typos added) and get typos fixed by [@​yarikoptic](https://togithub.com/yarikoptic) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2214](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2214)
-   Fix raspberry pi zero cpu variant recognition by [@​lstolcman](https://togithub.com/lstolcman) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2086](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2086)
-   storage: validate images converted to zstd:chunked by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2243](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2243)
-   Make blob reuse choices manifest-format-sensitive, and allow conversions when writing to format-agnostic transports by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2213](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2213)
-   Edit the manifest when pushing uncompressed data from c/storage by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2273](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2273)
-   Random storage-related cleanups by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2287](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2287)
-   Improve storage transport documentation, primarily about locking by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2291](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2291)
-   Fix c/storage destination with partial pulls by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2288](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2288)
-   Fix manifest updates when we match a layer by TOC digest by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2294](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2294)
-   Cleanly fail when trying to obtain a DiffID of a non-OCI image by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2295](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2295)
-   Beautify TOC-related parts of storageImageSource by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2296](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2296)
-   storage: use the new ApplyStagedLayer interface by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2301](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2301)
-   Also annotate image instances using zstd:chunked as using zstd by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2302](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2302)
-   Support editing ArtifactType, preserve it in lists by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2304](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2304)
-   Provide data to correctly report throughput on partial pulls by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2308](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2308)
-   Add validation error to digesting reader by [@​saschagrunert](https://togithub.com/saschagrunert) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2312](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2312)
-   Fix handling of errors when fetching layers by URLs by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2310](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2310)
-   Improve handling of zstd vs. zstd:chunked matching by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2317](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2317)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​rahilarious](https://togithub.com/rahilarious) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2215](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2215)
-   [@​yarikoptic](https://togithub.com/yarikoptic) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2214](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2214)
-   [@​lstolcman](https://togithub.com/lstolcman) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2086](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2086)
-   [@​bainsy88](https://togithub.com/bainsy88) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2260](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2260)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/image/compare/v5.29.2...v5.30.0

</details>
